manifest.name: OK Standby Jukebox

name: OK Standby Jukebox

releases.author: AUL-DoX
releases.description:
## OK Standby Jukebox 1.0.0

Initial release.

### Features

- Imports music source URLs from txt and url files.
- Moves mp3, mp4, png, jpg, and jpeg assets into the songs folder.
- Extracts supported files from zip archives before importing.
- Creates song notes from imported materials.
- Updates existing song notes without overwriting unrelated content.
- Adds a ribbon icon, command palette command, settings tab, and optional auto-watch mode.

### 日本語

初回リリースです。

source_docs に入れたURLメモ、音声、動画、画像、zip素材を取り込み、songs に曲ノートと素材を整理します。詳しい使い方は README.ja.md を確認してください。
